earthRotSpeed.help: Earth spin speed multiplier. 0 = paused, 1 = default, 2 = double speed.

sunAzimuth.help: Horizontal angle of the sun (0–360°). Controls where day/night terminator falls.

sunElevation.help: Vertical angle of the sun (-90 to 90°). Negative = below horizon (all night).

cloudRotSpeed.help: Cloud rotation speed multiplier. 0 = frozen, 1 = default, 2 = double speed.

cloudCoverage.help: Overall cloud amount. Higher = more sky covered. 50 = default.

cloudSharpness.help: How crisp cloud edges appear. Higher = sharper, lower = softer/more diffuse.

cloudOpacity.help: Maximum cloud transparency. Lower = more see-through clouds.

oceanBlueBoost.help: Blue channel multiplier for the whole ocean. 50 = neutral, 100 = 2× vivid blue, 0 = grey.

oceanDepth.help: Reveals bathymetric texture detail. Deep trenches darken, continental shelves stay bright. 0 = flat uniform ocean, 100 = full depth contrast from satellite texture.

exposure.help: Tone mapping exposure. Higher = brighter overall image. 48 = default (1.70×).

nightIntensity.help: Brightness of city lights on the dark side of Earth. 40 = default.

atmosIntensity.help: Intensity of the blue atmospheric limb halo. 14 = default. 0 = no glow, 100 = very bright.

fps30.help: Cap animation at 30 frames per second to reduce GPU load.
